# HN Electronics

> Premium electronics, components, and accessories for Sri Lankan creators, homes, and repair desks.

## Primary Routes
- [Homepage](https://hnelectronics.lk/) - Shop search, featured products, categories.
- [Shop](https://hnelectronics.lk/shop) - Filter and search all available electronics and components.
- [About](https://hnelectronics.lk/about) - Learn more about HN Electronics.
- [Cart](https://hnelectronics.lk/cart) - View selected components and checkout.

## Main Product Categories
- Development Boards (Arduino, Raspberry Pi, ESP32)
- Sensors (Temperature, Humidity, Motion, Ultrasonic)
- Active & Passive Components (Resistors, Capacitors, Transistors, ICs)
- Tools & Power Supplies (Soldering irons, multimeters, breadboards)
